Monetization

Pricing

UI-only billing demo

Pricing built for recurring rental maintenance.

UnitDispatch monetizes where value repeats: quote comparison for landlords, vendor management for PM teams, contractor profile upgrades, and an optional success fee on completed jobs.

Demo MRR surface

$716

Units represented

47

Contractor Pro

12 vendors

Stripe-ready structure

Checkout, billing portal, invoices, and webhook processing can replace this placeholder without changing the core UI.

Land-and-expand logic

Start with one portfolio, retain through recurring maintenance history, then monetize vendor network density.

Starter Landlord

Free/mo

For one rental and occasional maintenance.

  • 1 property
  • Limited job posts
  • Basic contractor search
  • Completed-job reviews

Landlord Pro

Best fit

$49/mo

Recurring maintenance workflow for small portfolios.

  • Up to 10 properties
  • Unlimited maintenance jobs
  • Quote comparison
  • Preferred vendor list
  • Maintenance spend tracking

Property Manager

$199/mo

Vendor control and reporting for growing PM teams.

  • Unlimited properties
  • Team access
  • Vendor management
  • Reporting
  • Priority contractor matching

Contractor Pro

$39/mo

Better jobs without lead spam.

  • Verified profile
  • Priority job alerts
  • Quote tools
  • Review and reliability dashboard

Platform Success Fee

5%/job

Optional fee aligned to completed maintenance work.

  • 5% success fee on completed jobs
  • Escrow-ready payment placeholder
  • Dispute and completion audit trail

Open workflow creates recurring usage.

Success fee

Optional completed-job fee

5%

Landlord retention

Maintenance tickets, spend tracking, and preferred vendors make the product useful after the first job.

Contractor monetization

Contractor Pro is positioned around better-fit work and trust credentials, not pay-per-lead spam.

Success fee optionality

A 5% completed-job fee can be added when payment flow, dispute handling, and acceptance records are live.
